caption:
Your perfectionism is a mask for the deep-seated fear of not being enough. It's time to confront the truth.

You've always pushed yourself to be the best, to prove your worth.
But in doing so, you've neglected your own needs and desires.
You've lost touch with what truly makes you happy and fulfilled.
It's time to let go of the need for control and perfection.

Your worth is not defined by your accomplishments, but by your presence in this world.

Lucky number: 5
Lucky color: Beige
Today's vibe: EMPATHY

Take a step back and re-evaluate what truly matters to you.

Music provided by sonican (https://pixabay.com/users/sonican-38947841/)

#virgo #astrology #horoscope #emotionalhealing

script.hook: Your perfectionism is a mask for the deep-seated fear of not being enough. It's time to confront the truth.
body: You've always pushed yourself to be the best, to prove your worth.
But in doing so, you've neglected your own needs and desires.
You've lost touch with what truly makes you happy and fulfilled.
It's time to let go of the need for control and perfection.
And instead, focus on cultivating self-love and self-acceptance.
script.reveal: Your worth is not defined by your accomplishments, but by your presence in this world.
script.cta: Take a step back and re-evaluate what truly matters to you.
script.affirmation: I am enough, exactly as I am.
